commands.review_summary:
The PR changes iOS SwiftUI and Android Compose chat views to preserve reader-managed scroll position, show Jump to latest, and add native proof harness/test coverage.

PR surface: Other +546. Total +546 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a feature PR. Current-main source inspection shows the existing native auto-scroll behavior, and the PR's behavior is demonstrated by simulator/emulator proof rather than a failing reproduction test.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is needed because the remaining blocker is maintainer acceptance of the native scroll UX and session-state semantics, not a narrow automation repair.

target.title: improve: make native chat scrolling reader-managed
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Native chat views currently move the transcript as messages, tool rows, and streaming text arrive. That can pull readers away from content they are reviewing in long or actively streaming conversations.

Fixes #98255.

## Why This Change Was Made

This brings iOS and Android chat scrolling closer to reader-managed streaming behavior:

- restore a saved/opened conversation near the latest user turn instead of the absolute bottom
- follow streaming content only while the reader is still following the live edge/current follow target
- let assistant/tool/stream content arrive offscreen after the reader scrolls away
- show an explicit Jump to latest control that returns to the newest reply and resumes following
- split Android initial restore targets from live-follow targets so active streaming can keep the prompt anchor without forcing every reopen to the bottom

## User Impact

- Reopening a session lands near the most recent user prompt for context.
- Sending a new message intentionally moves that new turn into view.
- Scrolling away stops automatic movement while new content continues arriving.
- A visible Jump to latest action appears when newer content arrives out of view.

## Native Behavior Proof

Proof artifacts are pinned here:

https://github.com/christopheraaronhogg/openclaw/tree/35232cbc99fe448ffba2431d8304976389430950/docs/proof/native-chat-scroll/2026-06-30

- iOS simulator recording: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopheraaronhogg/openclaw/35232cbc99fe448ffba2431d8304976389430950/docs/proof/native-chat-scroll/2026-06-30/ios-chat-scroll-proof.mp4
- Android emulator recording: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopheraaronhogg/openclaw/35232cbc99fe448ffba2431d8304976389430950/docs/proof/native-chat-scroll/2026-06-30/android-chat-scroll-proof.mp4
- iOS Jump-visible still: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopheraaronhogg/openclaw/35232cbc99fe448ffba2431d8304976389430950/docs/proof/native-chat-scroll/2026-06-30/ios-jump-visible.png
- iOS after-Jump still: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopheraaronhogg/openclaw/35232cbc99fe448ffba2431d8304976389430950/docs/proof/native-chat-scroll/2026-06-30/ios-after-jump.png
- Android Jump-visible still: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopheraaronhogg/openclaw/35232cbc99fe448ffba2431d8304976389430950/docs/proof/native-chat-scroll/2026-06-30/android-jump-visible.png
- Android after-Jump still: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopheraaronhogg/openclaw/35232cbc99fe448ffba2431d8304976389430950/docs/proof/native-chat-scroll/2026-06-30/android-after-jump.png

Proof setup:

- iOS uses the SwiftUI preview host for the actual shared `OpenClawChatUI` chat view and view model.
- Android uses a debug-only `chat-proof` screenshot scene mounted on the actual `ChatMessageListCard`.
- Both proof lanes use delayed stream/tool rows. Runtime snapshots/dumps confirmed Jump is visible while the visible transcript remains on restored context, and after Jump the iOS visible text includes the tool/live rows with Jump gone.

## Evidence

- PASS `swift build --package-path apps/shared/OpenClawKit --target OpenClawChatUI`
- PASS `ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk ./gradlew :app:testPlayDebugUnitTest --tests ai.openclaw.app.ui.chat.ChatTimelineTest`
- PASS `ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk ./gradlew :app:installPlayDebug`
- PASS `git diff --check`
- INFO `ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk ./gradlew :app:ktlintCheck` still fails on existing untouched files: `apps/android/app/src/main/java/ai/openclaw/app/GatewayExecApprovals.kt:100` and `apps/android/app/src/main/java/ai/openclaw/app/ui/design/ClawSurfaces.kt:3`
target.author: christopheraaronhogg

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
